basic_details.job_title: ESIC Faculty Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 33 Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Medical College & Hospital, Kalaburagi
basic_details.post_name: Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor (Broad Specialty)
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Kalaburagi is recruiting 33 faculty positions on contract basis in various broad specialty departments. Candidates must fulfill NMC norms and age criteria (less than 69 years with relaxations).

application_fee.details: Mode: Demand Draft in favour of ‘ESI Corporation’ payable at Kalaburagi.

age_limit.age_details: Contractual (1 year, extendable up to 3 years)

qualification.details: Qualification: As per latest NMC norms for respective posts. Age Limit: Less than 69 years (including all category relaxations) as on the date of document verification. Registration: Valid registration with Karnataka State Medical Council (KMC) / NMC. Experience: As per NMC requirements for Professor / Associate / Assistant Professor. Retirees from Central/State Govt./PSU and candidates from recognized private institutions are eligible.

salary_details.pay_scale: Professor: ₹2,48,850/- Associate Professor: ₹1,65,480/- Assistant Professor: ₹1,42,170/- (plus TA & DA as applicable)

selection_process: Document Verification (29.07.2026) Personal Interview (31.07.2026) Medical Examination & Certificate Verification
50% marks in interview is the minimum qualifying criteria. Final selection is based on interview performance.
how_to_apply: Fill the prescribed application form (enclosed in notification).
Report for Document Verification on 29.07.2026 between 09:00 AM to 11:00 AM at ESIC Medical College, Kalaburagi.
Bring all original documents, self-attested photocopies, 2 passport size photos, and Demand Draft (if applicable).
Attend Personal Interview on 31.07.2026 if shortlisted.
Venue: Office of the Dean, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Kalaburagi.
important_instructions: This is purely contractual engagement. No claim for regular absorption. No private practice allowed. Candidates must bring all original documents + self-attested copies. Application in prescribed format only. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Medical College Kalaburagi Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Download ESIC Medical College Kalaburagi Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Kalaburagi Faculty Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: ESIC Kalaburagi is recruiting 33 faculty positions on contract basis in various broad specialty departments. Candidates must fulfill NMC norms and age criteria (less than 69 years with relaxations).

rows.employees_state_insurance_corporation_es: Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor (Broad Specialty)
Contractual (1 year, extendable up to 3 years)
Professor: ₹2,48,850/- Associate Professor: ₹1,65,480/- Assistant Professor: ₹1,42,170/- (plus TA & DA as applicable)

content_sections.heading: ESIC Kalaburagi Faculty Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
ESIC Kalaburagi Faculty Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: 1. Professor -6 Posts 2. Associate Professor -12 Posts 3. Assistant Professor -15 Posts Note: PwBD reservation as per GoI guidelines. Vacancies are provisional and may vary.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Kalaburagi Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Qualification: As per latest NMC norms for respective posts. Age Limit: Less than 69 years (including all category relaxations) as on the date of document verification. Registration: Valid registration with Karnataka State Medical Council (KMC) / NMC. Experience: As per NMC requirements for Professor / Associate / Assistant Professor. Retirees from Central/State Govt./PSU and candidates from recognized private institutions are eligible.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Mode: Demand Draft in favour of ‘ESI Corporation’ payable at Kalaburagi.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Document Verification (29.07.2026) Personal Interview (31.07.2026) Medical Examination & Certificate Verification 50% marks in interview is the minimum qualifying criteria. Final selection is based on interview performance.

content_sections.heading: Pay & Allowances
content_sections.text: Professor: ₹2,48,850/- Associate Professor: ₹1,65,480/- Assistant Professor: ₹1,42,170/- (Plus TA & DA as applicable. No other allowances like HRA, NPA, etc.) Caution Deposit: Equal to one month’s remuneration (refundable after completion of contract subject to conditions).

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Candidates
content_sections.text: This is purely contractual engagement. No claim for regular absorption. No private practice allowed. Candidates must bring all original documents + self-attested copies. Application in prescribed format only. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: Who Should Attend the Walk-in Interview?
content_sections.text: Candidates meeting NMC norms for the respective faculty posts. Retired faculty willing to work on contract. Doctors with required teaching experience in recognized institutions.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ESIC Kalaburagi Faculty Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the prescribed application form (enclosed in notification). Report for Document Verification on 29.07.2026 between 09:00 AM to 11:00 AM at ESIC Medical College, Kalaburagi. Bring all original documents, self-attested photocopies, 2 passport size photos, and Demand Draft (if applicable). Attend Personal Interview on 31.07.2026 if shortlisted. Venue: Office of the Dean, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Kalaburagi.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in ESIC Kalaburagi Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 33 vacancies are announced: 6 Professor, 12 Associate Professor, and 15 Assistant Professor posts across various broad specialty departments.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for ESIC Kalaburagi Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no online application last date. Candidates must attend Document Verification on 29 July 2026 (9 AM – 11 AM). Latecomers will not be allowed.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Assistant Professor in ESIC Kalaburagi?
faq.answer: Assistant Professor will get ₹1,42,170/- per month (consolidated + TA & DA). Similar attractive pay for higher posts.

faq.question: Q4. Is this a permanent job or contractual?
faq.answer: This is purely contractual for 1 year, extendable up to 3 years based on performance. No regularization claim.

faq.question: Q5. What documents are required for ESIC Kalaburagi Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: MBBS, PG Degree, KMC/NMC Registration, Experience certificates, Caste Certificate (if applicable), Aadhaar, PAN, 10th certificate, 2 photos, and application form.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for ESIC Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must be less than 69 years (with relaxations as per rules) as on the date of document verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No. SC/ST and Female candidates are exempted from the ₹300/- application fee.

faq.question: Q8. When will the interview be conducted for ESIC Kalaburagi Recruitment?
faq.answer: Personal Interview will be held on 31 July 2026 from 9:00 AM onwards.

faq.question: Q9. Can retired doctors apply for these faculty positions?
faq.answer: Yes. Retirees from Central/State Govt/PSU in equivalent posts are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form and full notification for ESIC Kalaburagi Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application form is enclosed with the official advertisement. Full details are available in the notification PDF released on 16.07.2026.
